Ntc Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Dec-13-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - VINCENT OTYAND, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. JOSHUA S. WHITE, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4259 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings IS Granted with leave to amend. Plaintiff is granted leave to allege any cognizable claims he may have under the Government Code or otherwise against the City. AMENDED COMPLAINT TO BE FILED BY JANUARY 9, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK

Joshua S. White, DCA, from The Office of the City Attorney, for Defendant and moving party
Vincent Otyang, 415-359-3868, Plaintiff and opposing party in Pro Per

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling:
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted, responses within 30 days, request for sanctions is denied. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.
